summary: Comprehensive E2E testing of iteration 4 features: Stats Dashboard (GET /api/stats/sold), Enhanced /api/auctions/sold with filters/pagination, Admin routes refactor to routers/admin.py. All 40 backend tests passed. Frontend Sales page verified with all required UI elements.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/stats/sold correctly returns all aggregate fields: total_count, total_volume_eur, avg_price_eur, median_price_eur, min/max_price_eur, avg_mileage_km, by_make[], by_body_type[], by_month[], highest_sale
Stats endpoint supports ?days=30|90|365 window filter correctly
Enhanced GET /api/auctions/sold maintains backwards compatibility - returns plain list when no params, paginated object when filters used
Admin routes successfully moved to routers/admin.py with configure() DI pattern
Admin settings validation works: buyer_fee_pct 0-25%, negative rejection
Admin user management: phone must start with +, role restricted to user/admin, cannot demote self
Admin ban/unban: cannot ban self, cannot ban another admin
Admin comment soft-delete with WS broadcast working
Landing page hero has py-6 lg:py-3 padding (tighter margin)
Landing page hero image has aspect-[4/3] lg:aspect-[16/10] (shorter on desktop)
Sales page has all required data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Test comment created and soft-deleted for admin comment deletion test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 fully tested. New features: (1) GET /api/stats/sold public endpoint with window filter, (2) Enhanced GET /api/auctions/sold with filters (make, body_type, fuel, year_min/max, price_min/max, q, sort, limit, offset) - returns paginated object when params used, plain list otherwise for backwards compat, (3) Admin routes refactored to routers/admin.py (settings, comments delete, stats, users CRUD, ban/unban). Admin auction lifecycle routes remain in server.py. Frontend Sales page at /sales has KPIs, window toggle, charts, filters, sort, pagination. Landing page hero has tighter margin (py-6 lg:py-3) and shorter desktop image (lg:aspect-[16/10]).

backend_new: GET /api/stats/sold - all-time stats with all aggregate fields
backend_regression_admin_lifecycle: GET /api/admin/sold - sold auctions with winner info
frontend_landing_page: Hero section py-6 lg:py-3 padding (tighter margin)
Hero image aspect-[4/3] lg:aspect-[16/10] (shorter on desktop)

mocked_apis.stripe_preauth: mock_pi_* tokens used for payment pre-authorization (unchanged)
mocked_apis.resend_email: Falls back to console log if no API key
mocked_apis.twilio_sms: Falls back to console log if no credentials
